instruction:
Graph the functions
f(x)=\frac{-x^3+9x^2-20x-30}{x^2-5x} \qquad \textrm{and} \qquad g(x)=-x+4
in the same window. You may have to adjust the viewing rectangle to answer the following.
What is (are) the similarities between $f(x)$ and $g(x)$? Check all that apply. [ANS] A. they have the same $y$ intercepts  B. they have the same asymptotes  C. they have the same end behavior  D. they have the same $x$ intercepts
